title: Letters K and L
description: Right middle and ring fingers — K and L
text: k k k l l l ka ka ka la la la kal kal kal jak jak jak fall fall fall
tips: K and L next to J
Right middle finger = K, right ring = L

character_tips.anna: K and L. Two more friends. "Fall" is your new word 🌷
character_tips.maxim: Six home-row keys. Real words appearing.
character_tips.knopych: K + L UNLOCKED! 🎯 Six letters in your collection!
character_tips.klavochka: Two new friends joined, my sunshine ☀️
